---
title: "ATAC-seq Analysis Report"
author: "BF528 Final Project"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
bibliography: references.bib
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("functions.R")
```

# Section 1: QC discussion (FastQC + alignment stats)

- Summarize per-sample FastQC quality metrics.
- Report alignment and duplication statistics.

# Section 2: 2x ATAC-seq QC metrics

- TSS enrichment score.
- Fragment size periodicity.

# Section 3: Differential accessibility analysis (DiffBind/EdgeR)

- Build consensus peak set.
- Perform contrast: KO vs WT.

# Section 4: Peak annotation (ChIPseeker)

- Annotate peaks to genomic features.

# Section 5: Motif enrichment (motifmatchr + JASPAR2020)

- Identify enriched TF motifs in differential peaks.

# Section 6: Reproduce Figure 6a-6f

- Reproduce reference manuscript Figure 6 panels.
